description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named build that runs on push to master branch and on pull requests to master. The workflow has four jobs: linux64, cppcheck, win64_msys2, and win32_msvc. The linux64 job builds the project with clang and gcc compilers on ubuntu-latest. The cppcheck job runs cppcheck on ubuntu-latest. The win64_msys2 job builds and packages the project on windows-latest with MSYS2. The win32_msvc job builds and packages the project on windows-2019 with MSVC.
